title: AI Agents: How Do We Take Back Control? | Trailer
summary: A documentary by Alex Kantrowitz examines why 80% of organizations deploying AI agents report low control over them, interviewing technologists and policy experts. Research from 750 leaders finds only 1 in 3 AI agents in production operate with zero human oversight and only 7% of organizations have formal accountability structures.
writeup: This documentary trailer from Alex Kantrowitz frames a control problem in enterprise AI deployment: 80% of organizations running AI agents report low control over them. The film interviews technologists and policy experts on oversight, accountability, and governance. Research from 750 leaders supplies the core figures: only 1 in 3 AI agents in production run with zero human oversight, and only 7% of organizations have formal accountability structures in place.
